title: Marketplace App results in workflow block search
excerpt: Hey there. Wondering if there’s any plans with the new workflow blocks feature for the action/trigger/condition search within a workflow to have a section for marketplace apps to be displayed. Similarly to when you searc…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there. Wondering if there’s any plans with the new workflow blocks feature for the action/trigger/condition search within a workflow to have a section for marketplace apps to be displayed. Similarly to when you search for a dashboard widget within a dashboard, and marketplace apps are included in the results. I feel like without this, the discovery of ‘workflow block’ apps will be a bit clunky.
